mapper.sql: A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ASSIGN_SUB_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_SUB_NM, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ , A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.PIP_PREFIX, A.SIP_BLOCK, A.NBITMASK , A.SNETMASK, A.SFIRST_ADDR, A.SLAST_ADDR, A.NFIRST_ADDR , A.NLAST_ADDR, A.SFIRST_ADDR_BINARY, A.SLAST_ADDR_BINARY, A.SFIRST_IP_PREFERRED , A.SLAST_IP_PREFERRED, A.NCNT, A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID
, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , A.SIPMS_SVC_NM , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM

, B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , D.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_GROUP_CD , D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , E.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_OBJ_CD , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM AS SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM , H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , I.SIPMS_SVC_NM AS SIPMS_SVC_NM , J.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , K.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM

, MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_MST C , MST.TB_LVL_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD E , MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD F , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD H , MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST I , MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST J , MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD K , MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST L

AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ = C.NLVL_MST_SEQ AND C.SSVC_GROUP_CD = D.SLVL_CD(+) AND C.SSVC_OBJ_CD = E.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = H.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = I.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ(+) AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = J.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ AND J.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = K.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = L.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ AND A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ = L.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ

choose.when:
ORDER BY A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD ASC, A.PIP_PREFIX
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.NBITMASK
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.DMODIFY_DT
ASC
DESC
ASC
choose.otherwise:
ORDER BY A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD ASC, A.PIP_PREFIX
ASC
DESC
ASC

mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_SUB A
1 = 1
AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_SUB_SEQ IN
#{item.nipAssignSubSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
ORDER BY A.PIP_PREFIX ASC

SELECT A.SOFFICECODE , B.SLVL_NM AS SOFFICENAME FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST A , MST.TB_LVL_CD B , MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND A.SOFFICECODE = B.SLVL_CD AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = C.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ
AND C.NLVL_MST_SEQ IN
#{item.nlvlSeq}
GROUP BY A.SOFFICECODE, B.SLVL_NM ORDER BY B.SLVL_NM

SELECT A.SOFFICECODE AS code , B.SLVL_NM as name FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST A , MST.TB_LVL_CD B , MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND A.SOFFICECODE = B.SLVL_CD AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = C.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ
AND C.NLVL_MST_SEQ IN
#{item.nlvlSeq}
GROUP BY A.SOFFICECODE, B.SLVL_NM ORDER BY B.SLVL_NM
